name: Viltrox AF 40mm f/2.5 Lens
description: A compact prime lens designed for Nikon / Sony mirrorless cameras, the Viltrox AF 40mm f/2.5 Lens pairs a unique focal length with a fairly bright aperture.

features.Key Features:: Full-Frame | f/2.5 to f/16 | STM Stepping AF Motor | One ED Element, Three HR Elements | Ten Lens Elements in Six Groups | Supports Exif Data Transmission | Minimum Focusing Distance: 1.1'
